name: Perturbation Differential Expression

min_cells.guidance: Minimum cells per perturbation. Skip those below this.

outputs.de_results: Per-perturbation DE tables with log2FC, p-values, and gene rankings

validation.check: Ensure sufficient control cells (≥50) and that perturbation effects are biologically plausible (target gene should be among top DE genes if knockdown is effective).

notes: Cell-level Wilcoxon tests are acceptable for Perturb-seq (cells are independent perturbation events). This is different from cross-condition DE where pseudobulk is mandatory.
